Text.Page:
It's the same across the Fey Forest. Everywhere, the ghilliedhus became hostile and attacked everything in sight.

I can't bear to harm them, and I'm too little. But you could, . You've fought ghilliedhus before, I'm sure.

Look at it this way: you're just enforcing the circle of life. And when you're done, check in on Nemir, would you?

Harsi is kind-hearted, but she's right.
For the Fey Forest to be healthy again, the ghilliedhus must go.

But it's a tragedy nonetheless. , you must find who corrupted this forest, and make them pay!
